meta.description: A high-end, editorial swimwear store with a minimalist, image-focused design. The layout uses full-bleed product imagery, bold uppercase typography for headers, and a clean white background to emphasize the colorful lifestyle photography.

header.notes: Minimalist header with bold, condensed logo centered. Navigation on the left, utility icons (search, wishlist, cart) on the right. Upper announcement bar is solid black with white text.

footer.notes: Clean, multi-column footer. Left side contains text links grouped by category. Right side features a newsletter signup form with a black, square 'SUBSCRIBE' button.

productCard.notes: Large, portrait-oriented lifestyle images. Product details (name, price) below image in small, uppercase sans-serif. Heart icon overlay on image top right. Bag icon overlay below image bottom right.

productGrid.notes: Seamless, edge-to-edge grid with no gaps between product images. This creates a highly visual, lookbook-style presentation.

featuredProducts.heading: NEW ARRIVALS
featuredProducts.notes: Section header features filter dropdowns on left and right, with bold uppercase title in center.

design.styling: Thin bar at very top, no padding

content.specialElements: Scrolling or static text banner highlighting shipping/tax info

sections.name: category-links
sections.layout: Flexbox row, horizontally centered icons and text

media.description: Simple line drawings of bikini types (Bikinis, Separates, Neoprene)

sections.notes: Visual navigation for sub-categories placed below header, above main grid.

sections.name: product-grid
sections.layout: CSS grid 3 equal columns, no gap

design.text: Black (#000000), small uppercase for product names and prices
design.styling: Edge-to-edge images, no margins or padding between columns or rows

content.headline: Bold uppercase section title
content.cta: Icon-only add to bag button (shopping bag outline)

media.description: Full-body lifestyle shots of models wearing swimwear in sunny, outdoor settings (pools, boats, beaches)

content.items: Array of product objects with image, title, price, and icons
content.specialElements: Filter and sorting dropdowns positioned horizontally above the grid

sections.notes: The dominant visual element of the page. High-impact imagery drives engagement.

sections.name: pagination

content.body: Text indicating showing 1-30 of X products, followed by page numbers
content.specialElements: Simple numbered pagination with next arrow

sections.notes: Standard list pagination below the massive grid.
